GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbol1: At every spin, any combinations of 4 or more Gems touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbol2: For every winning combination, payout is made for each Gem according to the "Paytable".
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbol3: After payout is made, all winning combination Gems will explode allowing the Gems above them to cascade in.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbol4: Additional winning combination will be tallied until no more winning combination can be tallied.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyRespin: When a Respin Gem appears on reel and no more winning combination can be tallied, all Gems on the reel will be removed and a new arrangement of Gems will be cascaded into the reel.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyHero: At every spin, the Hero will travel and may encounter various events such as relics with different types of rewards and different types of monsters.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyRelic1: If the Hero encounters a stack of relics, the Hero will attack and destroy a block of relic at the start of every spin and at each gem explosion round after the spin that encounter the relics until there is no relic left.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyRelic2: When there is no relic left, the Hero may obtain a money bag, a treasure map or a treasure chest.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMoney: Prize is awarded (2x to 5x of the current bet amount) when a money bag is obtained.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyTreasure1: Encountering a stack of relics with treasure map can only occur when there is no active treasure map on reels or treasure key in hand.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyTreasure2: After obtaining the treasure map, a treasure key can be obtained when all positions indicated in the treasure map is activated by exploding Gems on reels.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyTreasure3: The treasure map is removed when all positions indicated in the treasure map is activated by exploding Gems on reels and the treasure key is obtained.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyChest1: Encountering a treasure chest can only occur when there is a treasure key in hand.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyChest2: Prize is awarded (10x, 15x, 20x or 30x of the current bet amount) when a treasure chest is obtained.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyChest3: The treasure key is removed when the treasure chest is obtained.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster1: If the Hero encounters one or more monsters, the Hero will attack the monster(s) and the monster(s) attacks back at each spin after the spin that encounter the monster(s) until the monster HP bar reaches zero.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster2: A Special Gem may appear when the Hero attacks the monster(s). The Special Gem will be placed on a random position on the reels when there is no more Gem explosion and no Respin Gem on reels. The Special Gem will transform some Gems into a randomly chosen type of Gem.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster3: If the Hero HP bar reaches zero, the Hero is unable to attack and the cat will create a healing shield around the Hero. Every spin and Gem explosion from here on will increase the Hero's HP bar. The monster(s) will still attack the Hero at every spin but with reduced damage. When the Hero HP bar reaches one third of the maximum HP bar, the healing shield is removed and the Hero is able to attack the monster(s) at the next spin onwards.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster4: If the monster(s) HP reaches zero, the monster(s) dies and coins are awarded.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster5: Defeating a Mimic, Bat or Skeleton will award 3x of the current bet amount.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster6: Defeating a Gargoyle or Treant will award 6x of the current bet amount.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster7: Defeating a Werewolf or Golem will award 15x of the current bet amount.
GemSaviourPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyMonster8: Defeating a Witch will award 44x of the current bet amount.

GemSaviourRules.BodyRules1: Gem Saviour is a 6 by 6 arrangement of Gems video slot featuring Respin Gem, Special Gem transformation, treasure hunting and battles with monsters.

BodyRules2.value: The game is played with 30 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
BodyRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip} & %{maxChip} represents numbers, Do not translate, Thank you
BodyRules2.example: The game is played with 30 bet lines (fixed), Bet Level of 1 to 10 and Bet Size of 0.01 to 10.

GemSaviourRules.BodyRules9: A Gem win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by bet size and bet multiplier. This amount is also multiplied by any applicable multipliers.
GemSaviourRules.BodyRules11: The state of the game is saved for each Bet Amount. When a different Bet Amount is chosen, the corresponding state of the game is applied.
GemSaviourRules.BodyRelicRules: After attacking and destroying a block of relic, if there is one or more Gem explosion on reel or there is a Respin Gem on reel, the Hero will charge his sword until there is no more Gem explosion and no Respin Gem in the reels. The Hero then proceed to release his combo attack which will destroy more than one relic.
GemSaviourRules.BodyMonsterRules: After attacking the monster(s) and the monster(s) attacks back, if there is one or more Gem explosion on reel or there is a Respin Gem on reel, the Hero will charge his sword until there is no more Gem explosion and no Respin Gem in the reels. The Hero then proceed to release his combo attack which will do additional damage to the monster(s).
